subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon My countenance, who speakest forth My praise, who soarest in My atmosphere, and who hast turned toward My horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی وجهی و الناطق بثنائی و الطائر فی هوائی و المقبل الی افقی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment
